# Inocul8

> Convenient and affordable vaccination and preventive health services at your doorstep in Lagos, Nigeria. Childhood immunization, travel health & yellow fever cards, adult vaccines, sexual & reproductive health, and corporate wellness. Rated 4.9★ by 59+ patients.

Inocul8 delivers vaccines and preventive care at home, at the office, or at access points across Lagos. To book, patients use the external booking page or WhatsApp; there is no online shop or checkout.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://inocul8.com.ng/): Overview of services, how it works, and booking.
- [What We Do](https://inocul8.com.ng/what-we-do): Full catalog of immunization, travel, sexual-health, and corporate services.
- [About Us](https://inocul8.com.ng/about-us): Company background, clinical team, and the Inocul8 brand.
- [Contact](https://inocul8.com.ng/contact): Address (Abraham Adesanya, Ajah, Lagos), phone, hours, and enquiry form.
- [Book an appointment](https://booking.cowva.com/inocul8): External booking page for all services.

## Popular services
- [Yellow Fever travel packages & cards](https://inocul8.com.ng/yellow-fever): Certified yellow fever vaccination and authentic yellow fever cards, with same-day options.
- [Childhood immunization ladder](https://inocul8.com.ng/what-we-do/immunization-services): Birth-dose through 4–6 years, per the Nigerian NPI schedule.
- [HPV vaccination](https://inocul8.com.ng/what-we-do/sexual-reproductive-health-services/hpv): HPV vaccines for children and adults, including pay-small-small plans.
- [Hepatitis B immunization](https://inocul8.com.ng/hepatitis-b): Hepatitis B vaccination and screening.
- [Travel health bundles](https://inocul8.com.ng/what-we-do/travel-health-services): Destination-based vaccine bundles for USA/Canada, Australia, Africa/Asia/Europe.

- [HPV treatment cost in Nigeria](https://inocul8.com.ng/hpv-treatment-cost-in-nigeria-a-cost-breakdown)
- [Blog: Talk Vaccines with Inocul8](https://inocul8.com.ng/blogpost)

## Contact
- Phone/WhatsApp: +234 706 373 6485
- Email: info@inocul8.com.ng
- Address: Blk A2, Suite 359 & 360, HFP Eastline Complex, Abraham Adesanya, Ajah, Lagos, Nigeria
- Hours: Mon–Sat, 08:30–18:00
